verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Levi : Gerson, Caath, et Merari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י לֵוִ֑י גֵּרְשׁ֕וֹן קְהָ֖ת וּמְרָרִֽי׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Levi; Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Caath : Amram, Isaar, Hebron, et Oziel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י קְהָ֑ת עַמְרָ֣ם יִצְהָ֔ר וְחֶבְר֖וֹן וְעֻזִּיאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Amram : Aaron, Moyses, et Maria. Filii Aaron : Nadab et Abiu, Eleazar, et Ithamar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י עַמְרָ֔ם אַהֲרֹ֥ן וּמֹשֶׁ֖ה וּמִרְיָ֑ם {ס} וּבְנֵ֣י אַֽהֲרֹ֔ן נָדָב֙ וַאֲבִיה֔וּא אֶלְעָזָ֖ר וְאִיתָמָֽר׃
verses.king_james: And the children of Amram; Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. The sons also of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eleazar genuit Phinees, et Phinees genuit Abisue.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶלְעָזָר֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־פִּֽינְחָ֔ס פִּֽינְחָ֖ס הֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֲבִישֽׁוּעַ׃
verses.king_james: Eleazar begat Phinehas, Phinehas begat Abishua,

verses.latin_vulgate: Abisue vero genuit Bocci, et Bocci genuit Ozi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲבִישׁ֙וּעַ֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־בֻּקִּ֔י וּבֻקִּ֖י הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־עֻזִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: And Abishua begat Bukki, and Bukki begat Uzzi,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ozi genuit Zaraiam, et Zaraias genuit Meraioth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֻזִּי֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־זְרַֽחְיָ֔ה וּֽזְרַֽחְיָ֖ה הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־מְרָיֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Meraioth genuit Amariam, et Amarias genuit Achitob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְרָיוֹת֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־אֲמַרְיָ֔ה וַאֲמַרְיָ֖ה הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֲחִיטֽוּב׃
verses.king_james: Meraioth begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

verses.latin_vulgate: Achitob genuit Sadoc, et Sadoc genuit Achimaas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽאֲחִיטוּב֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־צָד֔וֹק וְצָד֖וֹק הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֲחִימָֽעַץ׃
verses.king_james: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Ahimaaz,

verses.latin_vulgate: Achimaas genuit Azariam, Azarias genuit Johanan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲחִימַ֙עַץ֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָ֔ה וַעֲזַרְיָ֖ה הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־יוֹחָנָֽן׃
verses.king_james: And Ahimaaz begat Azariah, and Azariah begat Johanan,

verses.latin_vulgate: Johanan genuit Azariam : ipse est qui sacerdotio functus est in domo quam ædificavit Salomon in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיוֹחָנָ֖ן הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָ֑ה ה֚וּא אֲשֶׁ֣ר כִּהֵ֔ן בַּבַּ֕יִת אֲשֶׁר־בָּנָ֥ה שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: And Johanan begat Azariah, (he it is that executed the priest’s office in the temple that Solomon built in Jerusalem:)

verses.latin_vulgate: Genuit autem Azarias Amariam, et Amarias genuit Achitob,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּ֥וֹלֶד עֲזַרְיָ֖ה אֶת־אֲמַרְיָ֑ה וַאֲמַרְיָ֖ה הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֲחִיטֽוּב׃
verses.king_james: And Azariah begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,

verses.latin_vulgate: Achitob genuit Sadoc, et Sadoc genuit Sellum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽאֲחִיטוּב֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־צָד֔וֹק וְצָד֖וֹק הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־שַׁלּֽוּם׃
verses.king_james: And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Shallum,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sellum genuit Helciam, et Helcias genuit Azariam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁלּוּם֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־חִלְקִיָּ֔ה וְחִלְקִיָּ֖ה הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־עֲזַרְיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Shallum begat Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begat Azariah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Azarias genuit Saraiam, et Saraias genuit Josedec.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲזַרְיָה֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־שְׂרָיָ֔ה וּשְׂרָיָ֖ה הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־יְהוֹצָדָֽק׃
verses.king_james: And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Josedec egressus est, quando transtulit Dominus Judam et Jerusalem per manus Nabuchodonosor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיהוֹצָדָ֣ק הָלַ֔ךְ בְּהַגְל֣וֹת יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶת־יְהוּדָ֖ה וִירֽוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם בְּיַ֖ד נְבֻכַדְנֶאצַּֽר׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And Jehozadak went into captivity, when the Lord carried away Judah and Jerusalem by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii ergo Levi : Gersom, Caath, et Merari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י לֵוִ֑י גֵּרְשֹׁ֕ם קְהָ֖ת וּמְרָרִֽי׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Levi; Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæc nomina filiorum Gersom : Lobni, et Semei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה שְׁמ֥וֹת בְּֽנֵי־גֵרְשׁ֖וֹם לִבְנִ֥י וְשִׁמְעִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And these be the names of the sons of Gershom; Libni, and Shimei.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Caath : Amram, et Isaar, et Hebron, et Oziel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י קְהָ֑ת עַמְרָ֣ם וְיִצְהָ֔ר וְחֶבְר֖וֹן וְעֻזִּיאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Kohath were, Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Merari : Moholi et Musi. Hæ autem cognationes Levi secundum familias eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י מְרָרִ֖י מַחְלִ֣י וּמֻשִׁ֑י וְאֵ֛לֶּה מִשְׁפְּח֥וֹת הַלֵּוִ֖י לַאֲבֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gersom : Lobni filius ejus, Jahath filius ejus, Zamma filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽגֵרְשׁ֑וֹם לִבְנִ֥י בְנ֛וֹ יַ֥חַת בְּנ֖וֹ זִמָּ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Of Gershom; Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Joah filius ejus, Addo filius ejus, Zara filius ejus, Jethrai filius ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹאָ֤ח בְּנוֹ֙ עִדּ֣וֹ בְנ֔וֹ זֶ֥רַח בְּנ֖וֹ יְאׇתְרַ֥י בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, Jeaterai his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Caath : Aminadab filius ejus, Core filius ejus, Asir filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י קְהָ֑ת עַמִּינָדָ֣ב בְּנ֔וֹ קֹ֥רַח בְּנ֖וֹ אַסִּ֥יר בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Kohath; Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Elcana filius ejus, Abiasaph filius ejus, Asir filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶלְקָנָ֥ה בְנ֛וֹ וְאֶבְיָסָ֥ף בְּנ֖וֹ וְאַסִּ֥יר בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, and Assir his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Thahath filius ejus, Uriel filius ejus, Ozias filius ejus, Saul filius ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּ֤חַת בְּנוֹ֙ אוּרִיאֵ֣ל בְּנ֔וֹ עֻזִּיָּ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ וְשָׁא֥וּל בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Elcana, Amasai et Achimoth
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵי֙ אֶלְקָנָ֔ה עֲמָשַׂ֖י וַאֲחִימֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Elkanah; Amasai, and Ahimoth.

verses.latin_vulgate: et Elcana. Filii Elcana : Sophai filius ejus, Nahath filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶלְקָנָ֑ה (בנו) [בְּנֵי֙] אֶלְקָנָ֔ה צוֹפַ֥י בְּנ֖וֹ וְנַ֥חַת בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: As for Elkanah: the sons of Elkanah; Zophai his son, and Nahath his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Eliab filius ejus, Jeroham filius ejus, Elcana filius ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלִיאָ֥ב בְּנ֛וֹ יְרֹחָ֥ם בְּנ֖וֹ אֶלְקָנָ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Samuel : primogenitus Vasseni, et Abia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֧י שְׁמוּאֵ֛ל הַבְּכֹ֥ר וַשְׁנִ֖י וַאֲבִיָּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Samuel; the firstborn Vashni, and Abiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Merari, Moholi : Lobni filius ejus, Semei filius ejus, Oza filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י מְרָרִ֖י מַחְלִ֑י לִבְנִ֥י בְנ֛וֹ שִׁמְעִ֥י בְנ֖וֹ עֻזָּ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Merari; Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzza his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sammaa filius ejus, Haggia filius ejus, Asaia filius ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעָ֥א בְנ֛וֹ חַגִּיָּ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ עֲשָׂיָ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Isti sunt quos constituit David super cantores domus Domini, ex quo collocata est arca :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֗לֶּה אֲשֶׁ֨ר הֶעֱמִ֥יד דָּוִ֛יד עַל־יְדֵי־שִׁ֖יר בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה מִמְּנ֖וֹחַ הָאָרֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: And these are they whom David set over the service of song in the house of the Lord, after that the ark had rest.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ministrabant coram tabernaculo testimonii, canentes donec ædificaret Salomon domum Domini in Jerusalem : stabant autem juxta ordinem suum in ministerio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽהְי֨וּ מְשָֽׁרְתִ֜ים לִפְנֵ֨י מִשְׁכַּ֤ן אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵד֙ בַּשִּׁ֔יר עַד־בְּנ֧וֹת שְׁלֹמֹ֛ה אֶת־בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָ֖ה בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וַיַּעַמְד֥וּ כְמִשְׁפָּטָ֖ם עַל־עֲבוֹדָתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And they ministered before the dwelling place of the tabernacle of the congregation with singing, until Solomon had built the house of the Lord in Jerusalem: and then they waited on their office according to their order.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi vero sunt qui assistebant cum filiis suis, de filiis Caath, Hemam cantor filius Johel, filii Samuel,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֥לֶּה הָעֹמְדִ֖ים וּבְנֵיהֶ֑ם מִבְּנֵי֙ הַקְּהָתִ֔י הֵימָן֙ הַמְשׁוֹרֵ֔ר בֶּן־יוֹאֵ֖ל בֶּן־שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And these are they that waited with their children. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman a singer, the son of Joel, the son of Shemuel,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Elcana, filii Jeroham, filii Eliel, filii Thohu,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה֙ בֶּן־יְרֹחָ֔ם בֶּן־אֱלִיאֵ֖ל בֶּן־תּֽוֹחַ׃
verses.king_james: The son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Suph, filii Elcana, filii Mahath, filii Amasai,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־[צוּף֙] (ציף) בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָ֔ה בֶּן־מַ֖חַת בֶּן־עֲמָשָֽׂי׃
verses.king_james: The son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Elcana, filii Johel, filii Azariæ, filii Sophoniæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אֶלְקָנָה֙ בֶּן־יוֹאֵ֔ל בֶּן־עֲזַרְיָ֖ה בֶּן־צְפַנְיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Thahath, filii Asir, filii Abiasaph, filii Core,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־תַּ֙חַת֙ בֶּן־אַסִּ֔יר בֶּן־אֶבְיָסָ֖ף בֶּן־קֹֽרַח׃
verses.king_james: The son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Isaar, filii Caath, filii Levi, filii Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־יִצְהָ֣ר בֶּן־קְהָ֔ת בֶּן־לֵוִ֖י בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et frater ejus Asaph, qui stabat a dextris ejus, Asaph filius Barachiæ, filii Samaa,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָחִ֣יו אָסָ֔ף הָעֹמֵ֖ד עַל־יְמִינ֑וֹ אָסָ֥ף בֶּן־בֶּרֶכְיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־שִׁמְעָֽא׃
verses.king_james: And his brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, even Asaph the son of Berachiah, the son of Shimea,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Michaël, filii Basaiæ, filii Melchiæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־מִיכָאֵ֥ל בֶּן־בַּעֲשֵׂיָ֖ה בֶּן־מַלְכִּיָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: The son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Athanai, filii Zara, filii Adaia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אֶתְנִ֥י בֶן־זֶ֖רַח בֶּן־עֲדָיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Ethan, filii Zamma, filii Semei,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אֵיתָ֥ן בֶּן־זִמָּ֖ה בֶּן־שִׁמְעִֽי׃
verses.king_james: The son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Jeth, filii Gersom, filii Levi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־יַ֥חַת בֶּן־גֵּרְשֹׁ֖ם בֶּן־לֵוִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Merari fratres eorum, ad sinistram, Ethan filius Cusi, filii Abdi, filii Maloch,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֧י מְרָרִ֛י אֲחֵיהֶ֖ם עַֽל־הַשְּׂמֹ֑אול אֵיתָן֙ בֶּן־קִישִׁ֔י בֶּן־עַבְדִּ֖י בֶּן־מַלּֽוּךְ׃
verses.king_james: And their brethren the sons of Merari stood on the left hand: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Hasabiæ, filii Amasiæ, filii Helciæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־חֲשַׁבְיָ֥ה בֶן־אֲמַצְיָ֖ה בֶּן־חִלְקִיָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: The son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Amasai, filii Boni, filii Somer,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אַמְצִ֥י בֶן־בָּנִ֖י בֶּן־שָֽׁמֶר׃
verses.king_james: The son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shamer,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Moholi, filii Musi, filii Merari, filii Levi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־מַחְלִי֙ בֶּן־מוּשִׁ֔י בֶּן־מְרָרִ֖י בֶּן־לֵוִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fratres quoque eorum Levitæ, qui ordinati sunt in cunctum ministerium tabernaculi domus Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲחֵיהֶ֖ם הַלְוִיִּ֑ם נְתוּנִ֕ים לְכׇ֨ל־עֲבוֹדַ֔ת מִשְׁכַּ֖ן בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Their brethren also the Levites were appointed unto all manner of service of the tabernacle of the house of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aaron vero et filii ejus adolebant incensum super altare holocausti, et super altare thymiamatis, in omne opus Sancti sanctorum : et ut precarentur pro Israël juxta omnia quæ præceperat Moyses servus Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאַהֲרֹ֨ן וּבָנָ֜יו מַקְטִירִ֨ים עַל־מִזְבַּ֤ח הָעוֹלָה֙ וְעַל־מִזְבַּ֣ח הַקְּטֹ֔רֶת לְכֹ֕ל מְלֶ֖אכֶת קֹ֣דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁ֑ים וּלְכַפֵּר֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כְּכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר צִוָּ֔ה מֹשֶׁ֖ה עֶ֥בֶד הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: But Aaron and his sons offered upon the altar of the burnt offering, and on the altar of incense, and were appointed for all the work of the place most holy, and to make an atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt autem filii Aaron : Eleazar filius ejus, Phinees filius ejus, Abisue filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֑ן אֶלְעָזָ֥ר בְּנ֛וֹ פִּֽינְחָ֥ס בְּנ֖וֹ אֲבִישׁ֥וּעַ בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And these are the sons of Aaron; Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Bocci filius ejus, Ozi filius ejus, Zarahia filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֻּקִּ֥י בְנ֛וֹ עֻזִּ֥י בְנ֖וֹ זְרַֽחְיָ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Meraioth filius ejus, Amarias filius ejus, Achitob filius ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְרָי֥וֹת בְּנ֛וֹ אֲמַרְיָ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ אֲחִיט֥וּב בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sadoc filius ejus, Achimaas filius ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צָד֥וֹק בְּנ֖וֹ אֲחִימַ֥עַץ בְּנֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Zadok his son, Ahimaaz his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæc habitacula eorum per vicos atque confinia, filiorum scilicet Aaron, juxta cognationes Caathitarum : ipsis enim sorte contigerant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ מֽוֹשְׁבוֹתָ֔ם לְטִירוֹתָ֖ם בִּגְבוּלָ֑ם לִבְנֵ֤י אַֽהֲרֹן֙ לְמִשְׁפַּ֣חַת הַקְּהָתִ֔י כִּ֥י לָהֶ֖ם הָיָ֥ה הַגּוֹרָֽל׃
verses.king_james: Now these are their dwelling places throughout their castles in their coasts, of the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites: for theirs was the lot.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dederunt igitur eis Hebron in terra Juda, et suburbana ejus per circuitum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּתְּנ֥וּ לָהֶ֛ם אֶת־חֶבְר֖וֹן בְּאֶ֣רֶץ יְהוּדָ֑ה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֖יהָ סְבִיבֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And they gave them Hebron in the land of Judah, and the suburbs thereof round about it.

verses.latin_vulgate: agros autem civitatis, et villas, Caleb filio Jephone.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־שְׂדֵ֥ה הָעִ֖יר וְאֶת־חֲצֵרֶ֑יהָ נָתְנ֖וּ לְכָלֵ֥ב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: But the fields of the city, and the villages thereof, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filiis Aaron dederunt civitates ad confugiendum Hebron, et Lobna, et suburbana ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵ֣י אַהֲרֹ֗ן נָֽתְנוּ֙ אֶת־עָרֵ֣י הַמִּקְלָ֔ט אֶת־חֶבְר֥וֹן וְאֶת־לִבְנָ֖ה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־יַתִּ֥ר וְאֶֽת־אֶשְׁתְּמֹ֖עַ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And to the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of Judah, namely, Hebron, the city of refuge, and Libnah with her suburbs, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa, with their suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: Jether quoque, et Esthemo cum suburbanis suis, sed et Helon, et Dabir cum suburbanis suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־חִילֵז֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ אֶת־דְּבִ֖יר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And Hilen with her suburbs, Debir with her suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: Asan quoque, et Bethsemes, et suburbana earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־עָשָׁן֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית שֶׁ֖מֶשׁ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And Ashan with her suburbs, and Beth–shemesh with her suburbs:

verses.latin_vulgate: De tribu autem Benjamin, Gabee et suburbana ejus, et Almath cum suburbanis suis, Anathoth quoque cum suburbanis suis : omnes civitates, tredecim, per cognationes suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה בִנְיָמִ֗ן אֶת־גֶּ֤בַע וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֙יהָ֙ וְאֶת־עָלֶ֣מֶת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־עֲנָת֖וֹת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ כׇּל־עָרֵיהֶ֛ם שְׁלֹשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֥ה עִ֖יר בְּמִשְׁפְּחוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And out of the tribe of Benjamin; Geba with her suburbs, and Alemeth with her suburbs, and Anathoth with her suburbs. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filiis autem Caath residuis de cognatione sua dederunt ex dimidia tribu Manasse in possessionem urbes decem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵ֨י קְהָ֜ת הַנּֽוֹתָרִ֗ים מִמִּשְׁפַּ֣חַת הַמַּטֶּ֡ה מִֽ֠מַּחֲצִ֠ית מַטֵּ֨ה חֲצִ֧י מְנַשֶּׁ֛ה בַּגּוֹרָ֖ל עָרִ֥ים עָֽשֶׂר׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And unto the sons of Kohath, which were left of the family of that tribe, were cities given out of the half tribe, namely, out of the half tribe of Manasseh, by lot, ten cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filiis Gersom per cognationes suas de tribu Issachar, et de tribu Aser, et de tribu Nephthali, et de tribu Manasse in Basan, urbes tredecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵ֨י גֵרְשׁ֜וֹם לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָ֗ם מִמַּטֵּ֣ה יִ֠שָּׂשכָ֠ר וּמִמַּטֵּ֨ה אָשֵׁ֜ר וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה נַפְתָּלִ֗י וּמִמַּטֵּ֤ה מְנַשֶּׁה֙ בַּבָּשָׁ֔ן עָרִ֖ים שְׁלֹ֥שׁ עֶשְׂרֵֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And to the sons of Gershom throughout their families out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filiis autem Merari per cognationes suas de tribu Ruben, et de tribu Gad, et de tribu Zabulon, dederunt sorte civitates duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבְנֵ֨י מְרָרִ֜י לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָ֗ם מִמַּטֵּ֣ה רְ֠אוּבֵ֠ן וּֽמִמַּטֵּה־גָ֞ד וּמִמַּטֵּ֤ה זְבֻלוּן֙ בַּגּוֹרָ֔ל עָרִ֖ים שְׁתֵּ֥ים עֶשְׂרֵֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Unto the sons of Merari were given by lot, throughout their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dederunt quoque filii Israël Levitis civitates, et suburbana earum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנ֥וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לַלְוִיִּ֑ם אֶת־הֶעָרִ֖ים וְאֶת־מִגְרְשֵׁיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel gave to the Levites these cities with their suburbs.

verses.latin_vulgate: dederuntque per sortem, ex tribu filiorum Juda, et ex tribu filiorum Simeon, et ex tribu filiorum Benjamin urbes has, quas vocaverunt nominibus suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנ֣וּ בַגּוֹרָ֗ל מִמַּטֵּ֤ה בְנֵֽי־יְהוּדָה֙ וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה בְנֵֽי־שִׁמְע֔וֹן וּמִמַּטֵּ֖ה בְּנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֑ן אֵ֚ת הֶעָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה אֲשֶׁר־יִקְרְא֥וּ אֶתְהֶ֖ם בְּשֵׁמֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And they gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities, which are called by their names.

verses.latin_vulgate: et his, qui erant de cognatione filiorum Caath, fueruntque civitates in terminis eorum de tribu Ephraim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִֽמִּשְׁפְּח֖וֹת בְּנֵ֣י קְהָ֑ת וַֽיְהִי֙ עָרֵ֣י גְבוּלָ֔ם מִמַּטֵּ֖ה אֶפְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dederunt ergo eis urbes ad confugiendum, Sichem cum suburbanis suis in monte Ephraim, et Gazer cum suburbanis suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנ֨וּ לָהֶ֜ם אֶת־עָרֵ֧י הַמִּקְלָ֛ט אֶת־שְׁכֶ֥ם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֖יהָ בְּהַ֣ר אֶפְרָ֑יִם וְאֶת־גֶּ֖זֶר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And they gave unto them, of the cities of refuge, Shechem in mount Ephraim with her suburbs; they gave also Gezer with her suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: Jecmaam quoque cum suburbanis suis, et Bethoron similiter,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶֽת־יׇקְמְעָם֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית חוֹר֖וֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And Jokmeam with her suburbs, and Beth–horon with her suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: necnon et Helon cum suburbanis suis, et Gethremmon in eumdem modum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־אַיָּלוֹן֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־גַּת־רִמּ֖וֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And Aijalon with her suburbs, and Gath–rimmon with her suburbs:

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro ex dimidia tribu Manasse, Aner et suburbana ejus, Balaam et suburbana ejus : his videlicet, qui de cognatione filiorum Caath reliqui erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִֽמַּחֲצִית֙ מַטֵּ֣ה מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה אֶת־עָנֵר֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־בִּלְעָ֖ם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ לְמִשְׁפַּ֥חַת לִבְנֵֽי־קְהָ֖ת הַנּוֹתָרִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sons of Kohath.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filiis autem Gersom de cognatione dimidiæ tribus Manasse, Gaulon in Basan, et suburbana ejus, et Astaroth cum suburbanis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבְנֵי֮ גֵּרְשׁוֹם֒ מִמִּשְׁפַּ֗חַת חֲצִי֙ מַטֵּ֣ה מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה אֶת־גּוֹלָ֥ן בַּבָּשָׁ֖ן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־עַשְׁתָּר֖וֹת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Unto the sons of Gershom were given out of the family of the half tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with her suburbs, and Ashtaroth with her suburbs:

verses.latin_vulgate: De tribu Issachar, Cedes et suburbanis suis, et Dabereth cum suburbanis suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה יִשָּׂשכָ֔ר אֶת־קֶ֖דֶשׁ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ אֶת־דָּבְרַ֖ת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And out of the tribe of Issachar; Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ramoth quoque et suburbana ejus, et Anem cum suburbanis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־רָאמוֹת֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־עָנֵ֖ם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And Ramoth with her suburbs, and Anem with her suburbs:

verses.latin_vulgate: De tribu vero Aser : Masal cum suburbanis suis, et Abdon similiter,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה אָשֵׁ֔ר אֶת־מָשָׁ֖ל וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־עַבְדּ֖וֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And out of the tribe of Asher; Mashal with her suburbs, and Abdon with her suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hucac quoque et suburbana ejus, et Rohob cum suburbanis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־חוּקֹק֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־רְחֹ֖ב וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And Hukok with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs:

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro de tribu Nephthali, Cedes in Galilæa et suburbana ejus, Hamon cum suburbanis suis, et Cariathaim et suburbana ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִמַּטֵּ֣ה נַפְתָּלִ֗י אֶת־קֶ֤דֶשׁ בַּגָּלִיל֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־חַמּ֖וֹן וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־קִרְיָתַ֖יִם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And out of the tribe of Naphtali; Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kirjathaim with her suburbs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filiis autem Merari residuis : de tribu Zabulon, Remmono et suburbana ejus, et Thabor cum suburbanis sus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבְנֵ֣י מְרָרִי֮ הַנּוֹתָרִים֒ מִמַּטֵּ֣ה זְבֻל֔וּן אֶת־רִמּוֹנ֖וֹ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ אֶת־תָּב֖וֹר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Unto the rest of the children of Merari were given out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmon with her suburbs, Tabor with her suburbs:

verses.latin_vulgate: trans Jordanem quoque ex adverso Jericho contra orientem Jordanis, de tribu Ruben, Bosor in solitudine cum suburbanis suis, et Jassa cum suburbanis suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵעֵ֜בֶר לְיַרְדֵּ֣ן יְרֵחוֹ֮ לְמִזְרַ֣ח הַיַּרְדֵּן֒ מִמַּטֵּ֣ה רְאוּבֵ֔ן אֶת־בֶּ֥צֶר בַּמִּדְבָּ֖ר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶת־יַ֖הְצָה וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And on the other side Jordan by Jericho, on the east side of Jordan, were given them out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with her suburbs, and Jahzah with her suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: Cademoth quoque et suburbana ejus, et Mephaat cum suburbanis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־קְדֵמוֹת֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־מֵיפַ֖עַת וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:

verses.latin_vulgate: Necnon et de tribu Gad, Ramoth in Galaad et suburbana ejus, et Manaim cum suburbanis suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִ֨מַּטֵּה־גָ֔ד אֶת־רָאמ֥וֹת בַּגִּלְעָ֖ד וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֑יהָ וְאֶֽת־מַחֲנַ֖יִם וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And out of the tribe of Gad; Ramoth in Gilead with her suburbs, and Mahanaim with her suburbs,

verses.latin_vulgate: sed et Hesebon cum suburbanis suis, et Jezer cum suburbanis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־חֶשְׁבּוֹן֙ וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶׁ֔יהָ וְאֶת־יַעְזֵ֖יר וְאֶת־מִגְרָשֶֽׁיהָ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And Heshbon with her suburbs, and Jazer with her suburbs.
